nodes.label: Sentry Initialization Flow — Approach Comparison Reference

nodes.label: Sentry Init Approach 1 — Hybrid (zoneMismatch risk on web)
nodes.norm_label: sentry init approach 1 — hybrid (zonemismatch risk on web)

nodes.label: Sentry Init Approach 2 — Everything Inside appRunner
nodes.norm_label: sentry init approach 2 — everything inside apprunner

nodes.label: Sentry Init Approach 3 — No appRunner (Recommended)
nodes.rationale: Approach 3 wins: linear async main(), no nesting, easy Sentry removal, Flutter web compatible (no zoneMismatch). Approach 1 causes zoneMismatch on web. Approach 2 nests everything in appRunner making Sentry removal harder.

nodes.label: Sentry Init Critical Ordering Rule (init before ProviderContainer)
nodes.rationale: Sentry must init before first ProviderContainer read because provider logic may call the logger immediately and the decorator must find Sentry ready.
nodes.norm_label: sentry init critical ordering rule (init before providercontainer)

nodes.label: SentryLoggerService Decorator Class
nodes.rationale: Decorator over LoggerService intercepts all existing log calls transparently requiring zero changes to feature code, vs adding a parallel ErrorLogger which would require touching every call site (30-50+ files in a mature app).

nodes.label: Logger Severity to Sentry Level Mapping (trace/debug/info/warn/error/fatal)

nodes.label: Source Maps vs dSYM Mutual Exclusion Rule
nodes.rationale: Source maps (web) and debug symbols/dSYM (Android) are mutually exclusive per build. Never run both on the same build output.
nodes.norm_label: source maps vs dsym mutual exclusion rule

nodes.label: BetterFeedback vs Sentry Session Replay Rationale
nodes.rationale: BetterFeedback chosen over Session Replay: Session Replay requires paid plan, was less mature on Flutter web, and BetterFeedback is user-triggered (GDPR-safer, no ambient recording).
nodes.norm_label: betterfeedback vs sentry session replay rationale

nodes.label: container.pump() vs pumpEventQueue() for Riverpod Scheduler
nodes.rationale: pumpEventQueue() drains Dart event loop but NOT Riverpod's _ProviderScheduler. Only container.pump() flushes the Riverpod pipeline for state transitions.
nodes.norm_label: container.pump() vs pumpeventqueue() for riverpod scheduler

nodes.label: StreamController for Fine-grained Emission Control in ref.listen Tests
nodes.norm_label: streamcontroller for fine-grained emission control in ref.listen tests

nodes.label: Testability Smell: Internal ref.listen Conflates Command and Query
nodes.rationale: A Notifier that sets up ref.listen inside an action method conflates send and watch responsibilities, making state transitions depend on microtask scheduling. Recommend the UI watch the stream provider directly.
nodes.norm_label: testability smell: internal ref.listen conflates command and query

nodes.label: any(named: 'paramName') for Named Parameters in Mocktail
nodes.norm_label: any(named: 'paramname') for named parameters in mocktail

nodes.label: Mocktail Null Safety TypeError on Non-nullable Returns
nodes.rationale: mocktail's when() evaluates closure synchronously invoking the mock. For non-nullable returns the unregistered mock returns null causing TypeError before stub registration, corrupting verification state for subsequent tests.
nodes.norm_label: mocktail null safety typeerror on non-nullable returns

nodes.label: StreamProvider Override Strategy A: overrideWith (async, await needed)
nodes.norm_label: streamprovider override strategy a: overridewith (async, await needed)

nodes.label: StreamProvider Override Strategy B: overrideWithValue AsyncData (sync)
nodes.norm_label: streamprovider override strategy b: overridewithvalue asyncdata (sync)

nodes.label: Mocktail 1.0.x Verified State Bug (verify marks all calls before verifyInOrder)
nodes.rationale: In mocktail 1.0.x calling verify() before verifyInOrder() on same mock marks all recorded calls as [VERIFIED] leaving nothing for verifyInOrder to match.
nodes.norm_label: mocktail 1.0.x verified state bug (verify marks all calls before verifyinorder)
